title: Tangy American Hummus Bowl
description: A twist on traditional hummus, this tangy bowl combines classic flavors with a tangy kick. This recipe is perfect for meal prep and is dairy-free friendly.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the chickpeas, lemon juice, tahini, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, for 5 minutes or until heated through.
Stir in the olive oil and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a blender or food processor and blend until smooth.
Add the kale and cherry tomatoes to the blender and blend until the desired consistency is reached.
Season with additional salt and pepper to taste.
Spoon the hummus into a bowl and serve immediately.
Cover and refrigerate for up to 3 days.
To serve, top the hummus with your favorite toppings such as sliced avocado, diced tomatoes, and chopped fresh herbs.
Garnish with additional lemon wedges if desired.
